title: Toy Water Gun
description: Adds a toy water gun that can shoot either water, lava or powder snow
body:
# Toy Water Gun

Adds a water gun that can shoot:
- Water - extinguishes entities and blocks
- Lava - sets things on fire
- Powder Snow - places powder snow where the projectile lands and does increased damage

The water gun can either be refilled from a cauldron (whenever) or like a bucket (only if tank is empty).
While holding a water gun and pressing `shift + rmb` the pressure increases making projectiles be shot further.

![Modfest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)
